docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY CORKUM, SALLY AS TO DEFENDANT SUP WELFARE PLAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-16-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-13-1999 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUP WELFARE PLAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORKUM, SALLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUP WELFARE PLAN $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,348.00, VERA JOHONSEN IS DISMISSED AND SUP WELFARE PLAN IS SUBSTITUTED AS DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SUP WELFARE PLAN
